---
title: "Rāg Gauḍ malhār"
subtitle: "*Indrahunkī asabārī papīyana*"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: article
---

::: {.composer-info}
**Composer:** Tānasen &nbsp;·&nbsp; **Tāl:** Cautāl (Vilambit)
:::

## Lyrics {.unnumbered}

::: {.lyrics-block}

**Sthāyī**

> indrahunkī asabārī papīyana kī batiya  
> deśa-deśa khabara kārī

**Antarā**

> garaje damāmā bāje dhuravā niśāna bāṇa  
> bādara kī phauja caḍhi bundahu ki tīra māri

**Sanchārī**

> dāmini sohi rañjaka topa golā bāṇa chuṭe  
> kākara jiye birahinī bicārī

**Ābhog**

> kahe miyan tānasena jinake piyā bideśa  
> tinako ye jaṅga bhārī

:::

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal" collapse="true"}
## Reading the notation

Cautāl is a 12-beat cycle divided as **2 + 2 + 2 + 2 + 2 + 2** (vibhāgs marked **X**, **O**, **2**, **O**, **3**, **4**). Each row below shows **one complete cycle**: the twelve columns correspond to beats 1–12, with sam **X** at beat 1, **O** (khālī) at beat 3, **2** at beat 5, **O** (khālī) at beat 7, **3** at beat 9, and **4** at beat 11. 

The sargam row gives the notes; the bold text row below it gives the lyrics syllables. A dash **-** indicates a held note or empty beat. Brackets $\lb{\cdot}$ denote meend (glide) or grouped notes; superscripts $\sps{\cdot}$ indicate the starting grace note of a glide; $\tr{X}$ denotes a note in the upper octave (tār saptak); $\mn{X}$ denotes a note in the lower octave (mandra saptak).
:::

## Sthāyī {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table .cautal}

| **X** |   | **O** |   | **2** |   | **O** |   | **3** |   | **4** |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| - | - | - | - | - | - | S | $\lb{nD}$ | $\lb{nD}$ | $\lb{nm}$ | P | $\tr{S}$ |
| **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **i** | **ndra** | **-** | **hun** | **-** | **kī** |
| $\tr{S}$ | $\lb{\tr{S}D}$ | $\lb{nP}$ | $\lb{Pm}$ | P | $\lb{mg}$ | $\lb{\sps{m}g}$ | m | R | R | S | - |
| **a** | **sa** | **-** | **bā** | **-** | **rī** | **pa** | **pī** | **ya** | **na** | **kī** | **-** |
| S | $\mn{N}$ | S | $\lb{\mn{n}\mn{D}}$ | $\mn{n}$ | $\mn{P}$ | S | S | S | R | $\mn{N}$ | S |
| **ba** | **-** | **-** | **ti** | **-** | **ya** | **de** | **-** | **-** | **śa** | **-** | **-** |
| S | R | m | R | m | P | P | n | m | P | $\lb{mg}$ | - |
| **de** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **śa** | **-** | **kha** | **ba** | **-** | **-** | **ra** | **-** |
| $\lb{mg}$ | $\lb{mR}$ | $\lb{gR}$ | $\lb{g\mn{N}}$ | R | S | - | - | - | - | - | - |
| **kā** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **rī** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** |

:::

## Antarā {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table .cautal}

| **X** |   | **O** |   | **2** |   | **O** |   | **3** |   | **4** |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\lb{\tr{S}N}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{R}$ | N | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ |
| **ga** | **ra** | **je** | **da** | **mā** | **mā** | **bā** | **-** | **-** | **je** | **dhu** | **ra** |
| $\tr{R}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{R}$ | $\lb{\sps{\tr{m}}\tr{g}}$ | $\tr{m}$ | $\tr{R}$ | $\tr{R}$ | N | $\tr{R}$ | $\tr{S}$ | - | $\tr{S}$ |
| **vā** | **-** | **ni** | **śā** | **-** | **-** | **na** | **-** | **-** | **bā** | **-** | **ṇa** |
| $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\lb{\tr{S}N}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{R}$ | N | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ |
| **ga** | **ra** | **je** | **da** | **mā** | **mā** | **bā** | **-** | **-** | **je** | **dhu** | **ra** |
| $\tr{R}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{R}$ | $\lb{\sps{\tr{m}}\tr{g}}$ | $\tr{m}$ | $\tr{R}$ | $\tr{R}$ | N | $\tr{R}$ | $\tr{S}$ | - | $\tr{S}$ |
| **vā** | **-** | **ni** | **śā** | **-** | **-** | **na** | **-** | **-** | **bā** | **-** | **ṇa** |
| $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\lb{nD}$ | $\lb{nD}$ | $\lb{nD}$ | $\lb{\tr{S}N}$ | $\lb{\tr{R}\tr{S}}$ | $\lb{\tr{R}N}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ |
| **bā** | **da** | **ra** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **kī** | **-** | **phau** | **-** | **ja** |
| $\tr{S}$ | $\lb{\tr{S}N}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\lb{nD}$ | n | P | P | m | P | P | m | g |
| **ca** | **ḍhi** | **-** | **bun** | **-** | **da** | **hu** | **ki** | **-** | **tī** | **ra** | **-** |
| $\lb{mg}$ | $\lb{mR}$ | $\lb{gR}$ | $\lb{g\mn{N}}$ | R | S | - | - | - | - | - | - |
| **mā** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **ri** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** |

:::

## Sanchārī {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table .cautal}

| **X** |   | **O** |   | **2** |   | **O** |   | **3** |   | **4** |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| m | P | P | P | $\lb{Pm}$ | P | $\lb{nD}$ | n | m | P | m | g |
| **dā** | **-** | **mi** | **ni** | **so** | **hi** | **ra** | **-** | **-** | **ñja** | **ka** | **-** |
| $\lb{\sps{g}m}$ | R | S | R | - | P | S | R | m | P | m | g |
| **to** | **pa** | **-** | **go** | **-** | **lā** | **bā** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **ṇa** | **-** |
| m | R | S | R | R | S | S | S | S | $\lb{S\mn{N}}$ | S | S |
| **chu** | **ṭe** | **-** | **kā** | **-** | **-** | **ka** | **ra** | **-** | **ji** | **-** | **ye** |
| S | S | R | R | P | m | m | P | m | g | m | R |
| **bi** | **ra** | **hi** | **nī** | **-** | **bi** | **cā** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **ri** |

:::

## Ābhog {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table .cautal}

| **X** |   | **O** |   | **2** |   | **O** |   | **3** |   | **4** |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| m | m | $\lb{nD}$ | $\lb{nD}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | - | $\tr{S}$ | $\lb{\tr{S}N}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ |
| **ka** | **he** | **-** | **mi** | **-** | **yan** | **tā** | **-** | **na** | **se** | **-** | **na** |
| $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{R}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{R}$ | $\lb{\sps{\tr{m}}\tr{g}}$ | $\tr{m}$ | $\tr{R}$ | $\tr{R}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ |
| **ji** | **na** | **-** | **ke** | **-** | **pi** | **yā** | **-** | **bi** | **de** | **-** | **śa** |
| $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\lb{nD}$ | n | P | m | $\lb{nD}$ | n | P | $\lb{mP}$ | $\lb{mg}$ |
| **ti** | **na** | **-** | **ko** | **-** | **-** | **ye** | **-** | **-** | **ja** | **-** | **ṅga** |
| $\lb{mg}$ | $\lb{mR}$ | $\lb{gR}$ | $\lb{g\mn{N}}$ | R | S | - | - | - | - | - | - |
| **bhā** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **rī** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** |

:::
